expectations.text: Loads the file from docs/plans/design.md (non-default location)
expectations.evidence: Plan content matches docs/plans/design.md file contents

expectations.text: Metadata comment stores the full relative path: <!-- project-plan-source: docs/plans/design.md, status: draft -->
expectations.evidence: First line is <!-- project-plan-source: docs/plans/design.md, status: draft -->

expectations.text: Strips YAML front matter before writing to plan mode
expectations.evidence: No YAML front matter in plan mode content

expectations.text: Displays the plan content to the user
